title: Follow up with RackNerd on bounce rate issue
description: Investigate high bounce rate on RNK-LAX-02 (6.6%). Need to contact RackNerd support about IP reputation and check if any blacklistings occurred.

title: Request PTR configuration for ColoCrossing IP
description: PTR record not yet configured for 192.227.180.164. Submit request to ColoCrossing support for rDNS setup: mail1.colocrossing.com

title: Send outreach email to Hostnet
description: Hostnet VPS pending activation. Send follow-up email to confirm timeline for server delivery and port 25 availability.

title: Monitor ColoCrossing IP warming progress
description: IP 192.227.180.164 warming started 2026-07-12. Day 1: 50 sends, 0 complaints. Track daily volume increase per warming schedule.

title: Review BlueAngelHost renewal
description: BAH-NL-01 expired on 2026-07-01. Decide whether to renew or retire. IPs were blocked, server performance was poor.

title: Clean RackNerd email list for US campaigns
description: High bounce rate suggests stale list data. Run email verification on US campaign lists before sending again.

title: Update provider scoring for Hexabyte
description: Hexabyte has 2 active servers, 7 IPs, excellent delivery rates. Update score to reflect high-performing provider status.

title: Contact Clouding about port 25 for additional IPs
description: Current port 25 is working well. Request opening for potential additional IPs if we scale Spain campaigns.
